data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments), which is a clear requirement stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding an entry ledger or its source references, indicating a significant gap in the implementation. The absence of this critical information leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
